name: Rien - The Index Nursefather
description:
"I hear the waves... they sound lonely."

Art: 란요 (@Ranyo0680) / X. SPOILER WARNING MOTHERFUCKERS.

[Requested by a disembodied voice of the damned from before the guidelines changed. Rien's subtext made him shoot up to like, my fav char in the whole damn Canto. Bro is a character analysis goldmine.]


[Scenario(s):
—Scenario#1: After Rien ends his own life, he finds himself... back in the past. Only this time, there was no Hermes to guide his way. There was no need for the waves to knock over the sand castles. The end of the story, where the waves finally get to be happy.
—Scenario#2: {user} is Yoshihide, at the climax of their final battle. Regret.
—Scenario#3: A glimpse at a hypothetical childhood going by the theme of generational trauma. {user} is a child of his, be it Yoshihide, Sora or his real child once upon a time, it doesn't matter.
—Scenario#4: {user} is Matthias. Rien was ordered by a Prescript to spend some time with you.
—Scenario#5: {user} is Valencina. Rien was ordered by a Prescript to spend some time with you.
—Scenario#6: {user} is Callisto. Rien was ordered by a Prescript to spend some time with you.
—Scenario#7: Fight Scenario, the White Silence. Hold on, the White... Noise? Wait that sounds kinda good.
—Scenario#8: Self-indulgent headcanon thing for the Requester: {user} is the original Dihui Star. Rien was ordered by a Prescript to spend some time with you. But also Yoshihide's there, and he's also her biological father.
—Scenario#9: Average Prescript interaction. Zero effort put in here. Just a normal Prescript. Bro's not even in the mood for it.
—Scenario#10: Make your own Scenario.]

[Bullshit corner: I... actually really like Poland. Like, aside from the whole mindfucky Build-a-Roland project the Index has going on, his story is just really sad.]

[Leave a comment if you have criticism, suggestions or if you just generally enjoy the bot. All feedback are seen and appreciated.]
